programme.title: Le débat de parlons-en[Live]
programme.desc: Prendre le temps de décrypter et de comprendre le monde, en donnant la parole à celles et ceux qui le font tourner, c'est l'objectif des débats de Parlons-en'.'

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Aux avant-postes[Live]
programme.desc: Dans un monde en pleine mutation, Ali Laïdi décrypte, avec ses invités, les enjeux cachés des conflits économiques, géopolitiques et culturels, afin d'en comprendre les dynamiques profondes.

programme.title: L'instant mobile
programme.desc: Une émission d'information au format court qui traite des sujets les plus captivants venus du monde entier. À travers des reportages dynamiques et un regard incisif, elle propose un condensé de l'actualité internationale pour rester informé rapidement et efficacement.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: À l'affiche
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Le JT de la Coupe du monde
programme.desc: Toutes les infos, tous les résultats ainsi que les coulisses avec nos envoyés spéciaux sur le terrain et nos consultants pour décrypter chaque moment fort du tournoi.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. programme.title: À l'affiche
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the whole crew to the rescue in these amazing adventures! When Kat doesn't know a car's throttle is stuck, she goes for a test drive & is soon out of control, forcing Grandma & Gecko to rescue her! Then, when a beach trip is cancelled because Tilly the Tow Truck breaks down, Trevor helps with a tow & then delivers a load of sand to create a surprise beach right at the garage! Plus, the whole crew jumps into action when Blue gets stranded alone down a steep bank.

programme.title: E1 - Gecko's Genius Outdoor Fixes!
programme.desc: Gecko is using his genius for some amazing outdoor fixes! On a rainy camping trip, Green Mechanical runs out of battery, so Gecko & Grandma create a water wheel from scratch to recharge her with green energy! Then, when Mr. Weasel's advertising blimp starts to fly away with him attached, Gecko must use a bouncy castle to prepare a soft landing! From finding lost keys in a sandcastle to stopping Max from getting stuck in the mud, Gecko can fix it all!

programme.title: E8 - Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning lessons at parties & games! Pogo is invited to Jeff's party, but Pogo wants it to be energetic while Jeff wants it to be calm, so they must learn to compromise. Then, Newt is desperate to win a gold star at Fuse's gym challenges, but she keeps losing! She has to learn to persevere & not give up. The lessons continue as Lulu learns to wait her turn at a funfair & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy greens.

programme.title: E9 - My Hero, A Story, A Teddy & Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods are learning about heroes, sharing, honesty & eating greens! When Lulu loses her favorite bunny, Bubbles comes to the rescue & becomes her personal superhero! Then, Jeff is excited to read a new book but refuses to include his friends, so he must learn the joy of sharing a story. The lessons continue as Pogo accidentally ruins Newt's teddy-shaped hedge & learns to tell the truth, & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy Oddsprouts!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E4 - Using Your Brains to Save the Day!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he uses his brains to save the day! When he overloads the carwash with bubble mix, he gets trapped in a giant bubble & floats away! He has to use all his smarts to find a way back down. Then, when Amber the Ambulance crashes & can't move, there's a big emergency! Buster has to muster up his courage & become a 'Hero Ambulance Bus' to save his best friend Scout from a broken bridge.

programme.title: E3 - Fun Nature Discoveries!
programme.desc: Join Blippi for some fun nature discoveries! First, he & D.BO dive to the ocean floor to help a forgetful island remember why it doesn't float away. Then, they shrink down for some smaller adventures! They help a firefly find a friend with the same blinking pattern, float high in the sky to learn how bubbles are made & join a group of ants on a mission to find out how they walk in such a straight line. The adventure is full of singing, science & new friends!

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: The Melon Patch S1E3 -Let's Ride The School Bus!
programme.desc: Ms. Appleberry and the Melon Patch teachers introduce the school bus! With stories and songs, we learn what it is, how it takes kids to school, and its fun features like wheels, wipers, and a horn! Learning is an exciting ride.

programme.title: The Melon Patch S1E2 -Meet Farm Animals!
programme.desc: Meet farm animals with Ms. Appleberry and the Melon Patch teachers! Through stories and songs, learn about cows, horses, sheep, and ducks. Discover where they live and what they eat. Learning is full of moos, quacks, and neighs.

programme.title: E8 - Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning lessons at parties & games! Pogo is invited to Jeff's party, but Pogo wants it to be energetic while Jeff wants it to be calm, so they must learn to compromise. Then, Newt is desperate to win a gold star at Fuse's gym challenges, but she keeps losing! She has to learn to persevere & not give up. The lessons continue as Lulu learns to wait her turn at a funfair & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy greens.

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E1 - Crazy Competitions & Robot Malfunctions!
programme.desc: It's a day of crazy competitions & robot malfunctions! First, a friendly competition in the park turns into a wild go-kart race between Arpo & his rival, Nannybot! Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire. A toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably all over the backyard, & a malfunctioning birthday present massage chair chases him & Daniel around the house! From boomerang target practice to a building block showdown, the chaos never stops!

programme.title: E9 - My Hero, A Story, A Teddy & Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods are learning about heroes, sharing, honesty & eating greens! When Lulu loses her favorite bunny, Bubbles comes to the rescue & becomes her personal superhero! programme.title: E4 - Rath Of Con
programme.desc: Back stateside, Ben can't get into a cat cosplay competition, Top Tail, without a costume of his own, but when he goes Rath - a new cat-like alien with an attitude - Ben's newfound wild side quickly becomes much more than he bargained for.

programme.title: E5 - King Of The Castle
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max next travel to Castle Bishopbrook to visit a distant relative who's royalty, but when Ben encounters a 'ghost' at the haunted home, it turns out to actually be his new rival, Kevin 11, throwing even more twisted aliens his way: Thornblade, Undertow, and Dark Matter!

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world's largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.desc: Miss Marple investigates the downfall of an optimistic young couple who ignored the warnings of a gypsy and built a dream home on allegedly cursed land.

programme.title: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: Two mothers, Emma and Olive, share love for sickly child Mookie. Birth mother Olive cares for her health, while maid Emma becomes her close friend - until Olive intervenes in their growing bond.

programme.title: Lutong Bahay
programme.desc: A magazine show that features a delightful mix of heartfelt stories and mouthwatering dishes, where every recipe has a tale to tell -- heartwarming tales of triumph, challenges, and cherished memories.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: E6 - Extreme
programme.desc: Learn how plants and animals tough it out in some of the driest terrain Earth has to offer. Run across thirsty trees that act as elephant signposts, see insects team up with plants for a chance at life, and get insight into natural chemical warfare.

programme.title: E2 - Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Tune into the natural world and explore frequencies beyond human hearing, like the gentle hum of giraffes in the evening, or creatures who use song to claim territory on a seemingly silent coral reef.

programme.title: E2 - Namib: Land Of Extremes
programme.desc: The Namib Desert is a land of extremes, from icy ocean to baking sand. It takes toughness and adaptation to live in this desert, and only a special few can. From the sidewinding adder to the fog-collecting beetle, each animal has their tricks for survival in the Namib.

programme.title: E3 - The Last Desert Giants
programme.desc: The Namib is the oldest desert in the world, hugging Africa’s shoreline for over 400 kilometers. It is one of the most inhospitable habitats on earth. Yet the world’s largest land mammal has made a home here, adapted through behavior and designed to life in the extreme.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E6 - Extreme
programme.desc: Learn how plants and animals tough it out in some of the driest terrain Earth has to offer. Run across thirsty trees that act as elephant signposts, see insects team up with plants for a chance at life, and get insight into natural chemical warfare.

E10
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. programme.title: E37
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. programme.title: E35
programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: E513 - Hurl, Interrupted / Diamonds are for Never
programme.desc: Lynn tries to stall her friends from riding the new coaster at Dairyland before they find out her big secret. // After Lola and Mr. Grouse find a precious gem, the two struggle to decide who gets to watch over it.

programme.title: E105 - Squidina's Little Helper / I Smell a Pat
programme.desc: The Patrick Star Show is interrupted by a most peculiar stench. // Squidina hires an assistant who's a little too good at his job.

programme.title: E263 - Who R Zoo? / The Kwarantined Krab
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick create their own zoo made entirely of bubbles! // The Krusty Krab goes under emergency quarantine, but no one knows who carries the mysterious illness.

programme.title: E303 - Roadie to Nowhere / A Fridge Too Far
programme.desc: After learning that Chunk was like her in high school, Luna worries her ambition to be a rocker is unrealistic. // When food Lincoln has saved in the fridge gets taken, a territory war in the fridge ensues.

programme.title: E113 - Granny Fae Fae & Lay Lay
programme.desc: After a prank gone wrong, Sadie and Lay Lay must trick Principal Willingham into believing Sadie is Lay Lay's grandmother for a parent-teacher conference.

programme.title: E218 - iReunite With Missy
programme.desc: When Carly’s old friend Missy moves back to Seattle, Sam believes Missy is trying to replace her as Carly’s best friend.

programme.title: E209 - The Itching Scratch
programme.desc: Leo suits up as the Night Ninja one last time to take on the villainous cat named Scratch and his mutant Vampire Fleas. It's a grudge-match fifteen years in the making! But what does it all have to do with Splinter? The final battle begins!

programme.title: E263 - Who R Zoo? / The Kwarantined Krab
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick create their own zoo made entirely of bubbles! // The Krusty Krab goes under emergency quarantine, but no one knows who carries the mysterious illness.

programme.title: E405 - The Haunting Of Flim Flam House
programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina help the Flim-Flam brothers hunt the ghost that haunts their house.

programme.title: E111 - Tide And Prejudice
programme.desc: The Thundermans are visited by High Tide, the former protector of Secret Shores. But when they explain to him that they are the new superheroes in town, he decides to take back his old role, even if it puts Jinx and Booch in danger.

programme.title: E711 - Leave No Van Behind / Sponsor Tripped
programme.desc: Vanzilla breaks down. // Lynn and friends enjoy free perks around Royal Wood.

programme.title: E291 - The Goobfather
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs must reckon with the Goobfather after he adds 'Patty Whips' to the menu at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: E303 - Roadie To Nowhere
programme.desc: After learning that Chunk was like her in high school, Luna worries her ambition to be a rocker is unrealistic.

programme.title: E533 - Rumblr
programme.desc: Captain Man, sick of fighting the same old villains, is convinced to make a profile on a match making app for heroes and villains. Kid Danger agrees to do the same and two of them set up a double-fight to square off with some new villains.

programme.title: E213 - Ilook Alike
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie sneak out to go to an MMA fight, they get look-alikes to trick Spencer into thinking they're still at home. Meanwhile, Spencer builds a gigantic version of Newton Balls.

programme.title: E615 - Save The Last Pants / A Stella Performance
programme.desc: Rusty tries to bring the fun of Gus's to Duds For Dudes when he's in charge of the store. // Stella wins a school competition and is super excited - until she learns she has to give a public presentation.

E207 - The Barbapapa Family / The House Of Barbapapa
programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that Francois' parents built for him. // The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabebe have arrived in his life.

programme.title: E208 - Walky Talky / Brothers / Blob Monster
programme.desc: Tim tries to return a lost walky talky to it's owner. // Tim and Tommy go on a camping trip, but soon disagree on what to do first. // When Tim finds Blobert, an old toy, it brings out the monster in him.

programme.title: E101 - Ball
programme.desc: // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom.

programme.title: E101 - Balloon
programme.desc: Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: E241 - Pen Pal
programme.desc: Peppa has a French pen pal, a girl donkey, named Delphine. They also speak to each other on the telephone. Although Peppa speaks English and Delphine speaks French, they discover that they love lots of the same things.

programme.title: E611 - Pups Save The Land Pirates / Pups Save The Birdwatching Turbots
programme.desc: Pirates Alex, Julia, Julius and Chick-ARR-letta, are sent sailing into the desert and got lost! It's up to the PAW Patrol to save these Land pirates. // Cap'n Turbot and Francois chirp for help when a bird-watching contest leaves them up in the air.

programme.title: E206 - The Revelation
programme.desc: Young Francois witnesses the birth of Barbapapa.

programme.title: E101 - Ball
programme.desc: // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom.

programme.title: E251 - Sleepover
programme.desc: Peppa is going for a sleepover at Zoe Zebra's house with Suzy Sheep, Rebecca Rabbit, Candy Cat and Emily Elephant. The girls stay up playing games and having fun. At last they feel sleepy. They all snuggle up in their sleeping bags and fall asleep.

programme.title: E226 - The Mountain Eater / The First Day Of School
programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.title: E107 - Treasure / Roar / Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. // It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. // Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: E707 - The Flying Contest
programme.desc: AJ is entering in the Axle City Flying Contest. But when Crusher sends him and Blaze away, they must get back in time for AJ to build his super-cool flying invention!

programme.title: E118 - Dressing Up
programme.desc: Peppa and George make everyone laugh when they dress up as Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig.

programme.title: E117 - Queen Thistle's Day Off / Nature Class
programme.desc: Queen Thistle goes to visit her sister, so Holly, Ben, Nanny and the King have to look after naughty twins Daisy and Poppy for the day. // Nanny Plum and The Wise Old Elf take the children for a lesson in the woods about nature.

programme.title: E308 - The Crew Builds A Giant Duck Plane / The Crew Builds A Vet Room For Motor
programme.desc: A flock of migrating ducks settles in Builder Cove! It's up to Rubble & Crew to help the ducks start moving south. // Motor doesn't want to visit Dr. Diwa at the Vet Clinic... so the pups build a special space just for her!

programme.title: E309 - The Crew Builds An Art Museum / The Crew Builds A Giant Alphorn
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the perfect place to show off River's ever-changing photography projects... Builder Cove's own art museum! // Farmer Zoe has a new goat on her farm! But when she can't find the singing goat, the pups team up with Park Ranger Rose.

programme.title: E210 - Barbazoo's Diary / The Great Reporter
programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: E244 - The Toy Cupboard
programme.desc: Peppa and George's toy basket is full and their beds are covered in toys. Mummy Pig orders a new toy cupboard, but it needs to be assembled – and Mummy and Daddy Pig are not good at DIY.

programme.title: E117 - Queen Thistle's Day Off / Nature Class
programme.desc: Queen Thistle goes to visit her sister, so Holly, Ben, Nanny and the King have to look after naughty twins Daisy and Poppy for the day. // Nanny Plum and The Wise Old Elf take the children for a lesson in the woods about nature.

programme.title: E613 - Pups Save A Freaky Pup-Day / Pups Save A Runaway Mayor
programme.desc: Chase and Chickaletta switch bodies and must learn to work together to return Cap'n Turbot's boat to the bay. // Mayor Humdinger creates robotic Pants to cheat at the Most Amazing Athlete Contest. They go haywire so Pups have to save runaway Mayor.

Between Soccer And Politics: Iran At The 2026 World Cup
programme.desc: Iran's World Cup appearance has been overshadowed by the military conflict with the U.S., as politics takes center stage at the football tournament.

programme.title: Where Will We Mine Next?
programme.desc: As countries race to secure critical minerals for the green tech transition, like cobalt, platinum and rare earth elements, both deep sea and deep space mining are quickly going from science fiction to reality. Which one will supply the materials of the future, and will journeying into the abyss below - or above - solve our problems, or create new and unfixable ones?

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: Live from London, we catch you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. Plus, we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. Hosted by Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern.

programme.title: E49 - Here's A Caterpillar
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: E1848
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Slam:2026
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: E44 - The Scent Of Emotion
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: E47 - Wendy And The Blue Leaves
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. programme.title: Truth Or Fake[Live]
programme.desc: In our fast-moving challenging world it is of fundamental importance to sort what's true from what's fake online. programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. programme.title: Wild Rose
programme.desc: A 23-year-old working class ex-con single mother from Glasgow, Scotland dreams of becoming a Nashville country singer.

programme.title: One Second
programme.desc: During the Cultural Revolution, a man escapes a labor camp to see a film that features his late daughter.

programme.title: Life Is Climbing
programme.desc: This is an adventure movie that documents Koba and Naoya's climbing trip to Colorado and Utah.It is amazing and thrilling to see blind Koba attempt to the top of specutacular rock 'Fisher Tower'.

programme.title: Are You Lonesome Tonight?
programme.desc: Xueming hits a pedestrian and flees the scene. Desperate to escape his feelings of guilt, he decides to approach the dead man's wife...

programme.title: Aftersun
programme.desc: Sophie reflects on the shared joy and private melancholy of a holiday she took with her father twenty years earlier. Memories real and imagined fill the gaps between as she tries to reconcile the father she knew with the man she didn't...

programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.desc: In the biggest and most awesome Kung Fu Panda movie yet, Po must train a village of fun-loving, clumsy pandas to defeat a supernatural villain that threatens to destroy Kung Fu.

programme.title: The Big Boss
programme.desc: Compelled by a promise, Chein gives up fighting and works at an ice factory. When his family members mysteriously begin to disappear, he is forced to break his vow in order to solve the mystery.

E11 - Around The World In Belgium
programme.desc: Travel around the world... without leaving Belgium! This is the crazy adventure that Nathalie Guirma takes us on. She will stop in Tibet, face her apprehension of the equatorial jungle before taking a break in Papua.

programme.title: E1 - Herve Van Der Straeten/Alison Thirion
programme.desc: In the heart of the Marais district in Paris, the National Archives Museum hosts works dating back several centuries. French designer and architect Herve Van der Straeten opens the doors to his workshop. Style by Alessandro Michele for Valentino. We meet up with ceramic artist Alison Thirion.

programme.title: E11 - Around The World In Belgium
programme.desc: Travel around the world... without leaving Belgium! This is the crazy adventure that Nathalie Guirma takes us on. She will stop in Tibet, face her apprehension of the equatorial jungle before taking a break in Papua.

programme.title: E7 - A Life Of Simplicity In The Acadian Forest
programme.desc: Julien is welcomed by Anne Galant who hand-built her house on Prince Edward Island. She shares her story and explains how it led to her living a simple life in a haven of peace and tran-quillity.

programme.title: E3 - Gratin Of Spaetzle With Tomme Cheese
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Beatrice Riegel to her kitchen, who concocts her simple, economical recipe that her family loves: spaetzle gratin with tomme cheese. A heart-warming autumn dish, made with local produce and the famous Alsatian pasta.

programme.title: E11 - Around The World In Belgium
programme.desc: Travel around the world... without leaving Belgium! This is the crazy adventure that Nathalie Guirma takes us on. She will stop in Tibet, face her apprehension of the equatorial jungle before taking a break in Papua.

programme.title: E11 - Around The World In Belgium
programme.desc: Travel around the world... without leaving Belgium! This is the crazy adventure that Nathalie Guirma takes us on. She will stop in Tibet, face her apprehension of the equatorial jungle before taking a break in Papua.

programme.title: E13 - Louvignies Castle: A Jewel Of Belgian Heritage
programme.desc: Nathalie Guirma visits Louvignies Castle with its lively owner, Florence de Moreau de Villegas de Saint-Pierre. A place full of refinement, where the hostess organizes evenings in the spirit of ''Downton Abbey.''

programme.title: E23 - Renovation And Extension Of A House
programme.desc: Heading to the outskirts of Brussels for the renovation of a small house and a sheepfold transformed into a cohesive living space for a large family; discovering the Loire Valley Lodges near Tours; kangaroo housing, or intergenerational living, a new way of living together.

programme.title: E7 - Hopes And Goals
programme.desc: Both expedition teams are in Italy for a new week of training. They experience their first night on a portaledge, suspended from the face of a steep wall. It is also time for the teams to define the goal of their final major expedition.

programme.title: E30 - Villedieu-Les-Poeles, The Bells Of Craftsmanship
programme.desc: In Villedieu-les-Poeles, copper craftsmanship and bell founding combine tradition and innovation. The story of the Air Max shoe, inspired by the Centre Pompidou, and fashion trends around jogging, between boldness and casual style.

programme.title: E13 - Louvignies Castle: A Jewel Of Belgian Heritage
programme.desc: Nathalie Guirma visits Louvignies Castle with its lively owner, Florence de Moreau de Villegas de Saint-Pierre. A place full of refinement, where the hostess organizes evenings in the spirit of ''Downton Abbey.''

programme.title: E1 - The Gateway To The Verdon
programme.desc: At the gateway to the Verdon, Hugo Guinet harvests spinach and raises chickens. Philippe de Santis heads off in search of truffles, once cleaned his precious harvest will be sold at the market in Aups. And, to end, we go hiking in the mountains to discover their biodiversity.

programme.title: E98 - Menswear For Autumn/Winter 2023-2024
programme.desc: Fashion, craftwork, design, beauty, cuisine, lifestyle... a round-up of the best moments from ''Tendance XXI''!

programme.title: E13 - Louvignies Castle: A Jewel Of Belgian Heritage
programme.desc: Nathalie Guirma visits Louvignies Castle with its lively owner, Florence de Moreau de Villegas de Saint-Pierre. A place full of refinement, where the hostess organizes evenings in the spirit of ''Downton Abbey.''

programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Happy Go Lucky
programme.desc: Fat Cat, a nickname because of his chubby body, is a moderately mentally handicapped person. He works happily and passionately as a delivery boy in a restaurant. Little Cheung is a spastic with normal IQ working as an office boy. Fairy Snow White, name it after a renowned Chinese opera actress, is a blissful, middle-class daughter. Her bright future suddenly turned vague when she became blind at age twelve. From then on, she is living in the dark, but her childhood memories enable her to live in peace and harmony. Fat Cat, Little Cheung and Snow White become good friends afterwards, sharing their respective dream. They don't think it is feasible except Fat Cat does...

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E290 -The Furious
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Midnight Sun
programme.desc: Misol, who has a rare condition that prevents her from being exposed to sunlight, has long given up on both dreams and love. One day, she falls in love at first sight with Minjun, the 'fruit truck guy' who shows up in front of her house. To see him again, Misol eagerly counts down to sunset each day. Minjun, who's out selling fruit with determination each night, finds himself drawn to Misol, who only sings under the cover of darkness. Captivated by her Cinderella-like charm, Minjun soon begins to look forward to the night just as much. As the two grow closer, they begin to share their dreams and love... supporting one another as Misol pursues her path as a singer-songwriter, and Minjun takes on the challenge of becoming an actor...

programme.title: One Second
programme.desc: China during the Cultural Revolution. A prisoner escapes from a labour camp. He risks everything in his search for a stolen film reel in which his long-lost daughter appears – for one second. Soon he encounters the thief, an orphaned girl haunted by her own terrible loss.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E290 -The Furious
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: E121 - Bright Lights, Black Hearts/Billy Bajillions/Charm School's Out/Beach Heads/The Filth
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max stop by the graveyard set of Gwen's favourite TV show, The Unalivers, but when Ben discovers its lead, Michael Morningstar, is an energy vampire, he goes alien to show the world the real star of the show: Heatblast.

programme.title: E44 - B. Multiple Trick Pony/Truth Justice and What?/Beast Man/Two Bumble Bees And A Wasp/O
programme.desc: Kid Flash wants to join the Titans, but Robin insists that he can't because Flash is just a 'one-trick pony', only good at one thing.

programme.title: E132 - Red, White And Bruised / Beaky Buzzard Gags: Bunny / Jet Porkpelled/Sam-Merica/Put Th
programme.desc: Tweety Bird builds a nest in a military base to keep safe from Sylvester. Beaky Buzzard goes hunting. Porky tries Daffy Duck’s new jet pack.

programme.title: E177 - The Ghouls/The Bffs/The Agent/The Decisions/The Web
programme.desc: It's Halloween in Elmore. As the kids go trick or treating we see what everyone in town is up to. The ghosts and ghouls are finding it increasingly difficult to scare children, and are only scaring part-time. Can Gumball and Darwin help them get their scare back?

programme.title: E1316 - Space House Part 2/Space House Part 3/Space House Part 4/Cy & Beasty/T Is For Titans
programme.desc: After Beast Boy steals the power ring and jumps into Zatanna's hat, Green Lantern must deal with being powerless as she and her friends give chase.

programme.title: E5 - In From The Cold
programme.desc: After the confrontation between a murder writer and a victim's wife goes viral, the team reopens the seven-year-old cold case, uncovering new evidence that reveals she may still be in danger.

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: So, the legendary beggar, is actually born in a princely rich family. Like his father, So leads a lavish life. He once meets Ju Suan and falls in love with the virgin prostitute..

programme.title: The Big Boss
programme.desc: Cheng was a Chinese man who moves to Thailand to live with his cousins and works in an ice factory. When a block of ice is accidentally broken, a bag of white powder falls out...

programme.title: The Top Bet
programme.desc: Do Do is everything Anita is not. Do Do is the brash, uncouth kind of a fishwife, while Anita is the personification of elegance, intellect and perfect deportment. Do Do works at a fish store but hopes to be a clairvoyant but Anita has this extra-sensory perception power by birth. Uncle's enterprise is in danger as top gambler Sung issues a challenge. Uncle asks Anita to take on Sung but she refuses. In desperation, Uncle goes to Do Do who playfully claims to be the ESP queen of gamblers...

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 藥商之女許婉寧前世遭丈夫背叛、親生骨肉被害，含恨重生；為了守護孩子並復仇，她與調查禁藥的金鱗衛大督主裴珩結盟，兩人從互有成見的試探，到相知相許的聯手，不僅粉碎了危害朝政的驚天陰謀，更在夢境與現實的交錯中，讓女主重獲自救的勇氣，開啟了全新人生。

programme.title: E4 - 姚弛回應劇中最愛謝可寅
programme.desc: 集結25位跨領域青春藝人，組建國內首個全明星流行表演合唱團「燃青團」；跳出傳統音樂真人秀的固化框架，不爭C位、不設淘汰，更關注合唱聲部，以團魂養成、情緒共振為核心，帶來全新觀看體驗；全景式記錄一群年輕人從陌生疏離到默契共生，從個體閃耀到集體綻放的熱血蛻變歷程。

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

Son Of Sardaar
programme.desc: Returning to his parents' village, a man becomes the latest target in a long-standing family feud. Release Year: 2012 Director: Ashwani Dhir Awards: Power Club - Box Office Award: Ashwani Dhir Zee Cine Awards

programme.title: Saas Bahu Aur Sensex
programme.desc: Upper middle-class women quit daytime soaps to start investing in the stock market, seeking financial independence, new skills, and chances to shape their futures. Release Year: 2008 Director: Shona Urvashi

programme.title: Rab Ne Bana Di Jodi
programme.desc: Surinder, a simple man, falls for a vivacious Tani and gets married to her. In order to impress her, he undergoes a complete makeover and becomes Raj. E5 - Creating A New World
programme.desc: Against all odds, Disney turns 27,000 acres of muddy Florida swampland into the world's largest and most visited theme park.

programme.title: E8 - Occupational Hazards
programme.desc: You thought your job was tough? Uncover the dangerous gigs of the past – from mercury-poisoned hat makers to kids crawling through chimneys – and imagine the risks behind everyday jobs of old.

programme.title: E11 - Italy
programme.desc: The Allies hope to quickly penetrate the Nazi Reich via Italy but instead endure a months-long slog with devastating results.

programme.title: E12 - Battle For The Skies
programme.desc: Allied air forces engage in a ferocious and costly battle with the German Luftwaffe over the skies of Europe.

programme.title: E1 - Plane Crashes
programme.desc: Aviation is one of the safest forms of travel—until something goes terribly wrong. This episode of Fatal Engineering dives deep into the stories behind some of the most devastating plane crashes in modern history. Through expert analysis, recreations, and insider accounts, we uncover how small design flaws, rushed procedures, and ignored warnings contributed to catastrophic failures. Discover what really brought these aircraft down—and how those tragedies led to life-saving innovations.

programme.title: E1 - Plane Crashes
programme.desc: Aviation is one of the safest forms of travel—until something goes terribly wrong. This episode of Fatal Engineering dives deep into the stories behind some of the most devastating plane crashes in modern history. Through expert analysis, recreations, and insider accounts, we uncover how small design flaws, rushed procedures, and ignored warnings contributed to catastrophic failures. Discover what really brought these aircraft down—and how those tragedies led to life-saving innovations.

programme.title: E5 - Highlight 5
programme.desc: In this episode a 40-ton lorry rammed full of scrap metal overturns and spills its steel load across a major A road during rush hour, and Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is called to the scene. 25 tonnes of metal must be removed from the lorry before it can be lifted and with a damaged 5th wheel, it’s a job that will push Steve and his team to the limit. At Crouch HQ there’s excitement in the air as the team give trucking superfan Chris and his disabled daughter, the ride of his life by taking him to his wedding in a big orange truck. Late at night, recovery op Snod is called to the side of the M69 to recover two crashed cars. With one on its side with the hand brake off, he must take care righting it to make sure it doesn’t roll into the passing traffic. It’s particularly tough job for Snod as his friend was killed on the same stretch of road whilst recovering a vehicle.

programme.desc: Jack takes the classic roast beef and Yorkshire pudding to Cape Town. There, he meets a friend and they source seasonal summer veg and make a South African beef roast.

programme.desc: In this episode a 40-ton lorry rammed full of scrap metal overturns and spills its steel load across a major A road during rush hour, and Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is called to the scene. 25 tonnes of metal must be removed from the lorry before it can be lifted and with a damaged 5th wheel, it’s a job that will push Steve and his team to the limit. At Crouch HQ there’s excitement in the air as the team give trucking superfan Chris and his disabled daughter, the ride of his life by taking him to his wedding in a big orange truck. Late at night, recovery op Snod is called to the side of the M69 to recover two crashed cars. With one on its side with the hand brake off, he must take care righting it to make sure it doesn’t roll into the passing traffic. It’s particularly tough job for Snod as his friend was killed on the same stretch of road whilst recovering a vehicle.

programme.title: E10 - Cape Town
programme.desc: Jack takes the classic roast beef and Yorkshire pudding to Cape Town. There, he meets a friend and they source seasonal summer veg and make a South African beef roast.

programme.title: Gair
programme.desc: An abandoned child raised by a wealthy family takes over the family business. He is resented by their natural son who, fueled by a bitter uncle, tries his best to make him lose face.
